name: minervini_trend_template
source: Mark Minervini, Trade Like a Stock Market Wizard, 2013
principle: Stock must be in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend: price above key moving averages in proper order, near 52-week high, and at least 30% above 52-week low.

name: minervini_breakout_volume
source: Mark Minervini, Trade Like a Stock Market Wizard, 2013
principle: Enter on a breakout from a base on expanding volume — price clears the prior 50-day high with volume above its average.

name: connors_rsi2_pullback
source: Larry Connors, Short Term Trading Strategies That Work, 2008
principle: Buy short-term pullbacks within uptrends when RSI(2) drops below 5 while price remains above its 200-day MA; exit when price closes above the 5-day MA.

name: gujral_20ema_pullback_resume
source: Ashwani Gujral — How to Make Money in Intraday Trading (Vision Books, 2018)
principle: In an established uptrend, buy the pullback that touches or approaches the 20 EMA and then resumes upward — 'buy the dip to the moving average in a trending market, never counter-trend.'

name: gujral_trend_alignment_dual_ma
source: Ashwani Gujral — How to Make Money in Intraday Trading (Vision Books, 2018)
principle: Trade only with the trend of the higher timeframe. Shorter MA above longer MA confirms trend alignment; a daily-timeframe long is stronger when the weekly trend agrees.

name: gujral_exceptional_candle_volume
source: Ashwani Gujral — How to Make Money in Intraday Trading (Vision Books, 2018)
principle: Unusually large range candles with strong volume in the trend direction signal institutional participation; entries on/after such candles in trend direction have follow-through.

name: gujral_gap_and_hold_uptrend
source: Ashwani Gujral — How to Make Money in Intraday Trading (Vision Books, 2018)
principle: Gaps in trend direction that hold above the prior day's range tend to run; fading gaps against the bigger trend is low-probability.
